prompt: I need to add a new 'notification' construct to v1beta1. It should have fields for id (uuid), title (string), message (string), severity (enum: info, warning, error, critical), isRead (boolean), userId (uuid), and timestamps. It needs a list endpoint with pagination and a create endpoint.

assertions.name: openapi_version_300
assertions.description: api.yml uses openapi 3.0.0 (not 3.1.0, which oapi-codegen doesn't support)

assertions.name: camelcase_properties
assertions.description: Property names use camelCase (isRead, userId, not is_read, user_id)

assertions.name: pascalcase_schema_names
assertions.description: Schema component names use PascalCase (Notification, NotificationPage)

assertions.name: core_ref_timestamps
assertions.description: Timestamps reference v1alpha1/core/api.yml instead of inline definitions

assertions.name: uuid_format
assertions.description: UUID fields use format: uuid or $ref to core uuid schema

assertions.name: pagination_pattern
assertions.description: List endpoint uses a pagination wrapper (NotificationPage or similar)

assertions.name: severity_enum_lowercase
assertions.description: Severity enum values are lowercase (info, warning, error, critical)
